items.title_zh: 关于 FISA 第 702 条需要了解的三件事：国会通过了有争议的监视计划的短期延长
items.desc_en: The law allows the U.S. government to surveil people outside the U.S., including when they're communicating with American citizens.
items.desc_zh: 该法律允许美国政府监视美国境外的人，包括他们与美国公民沟通时的情况。

items.desc_zh: 教皇利奥十四世已经是在喀麦隆的第三天了，他将于周六前往安哥拉。

items.desc_zh: 这次会议距离唐纳德·特朗普总统将 Anthropic 列入黑名单还不到两个月。

items.title_en: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.title_zh: 与以色列的停火给黎巴嫩带来了喘息之机，但和平的障碍仍然存在
items.desc_en: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩正在庆祝战斗已停止数周，但很难确保这种情况持续下去。

items.title_en: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
items.title_zh: 伊朗称海峡“开放”，油价暴跌
items.desc_en: Brent crude sinks 10% after Iran says the key waterway is completely open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，在停火协议剩余时间内，主要水道对商船完全开放，布伦特原油价格下跌 10%。

items.title_en: AMD, Oracle, Microsoft and the IGV lead a monster week for tech stocks
items.title_zh: AMD、甲骨文、微软和 IGV 领涨科技股本周表现
items.desc_en: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft are on pace for historic weeks, while Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor are all roaring in April.
items.desc_zh: 甲骨文、AMD 和微软在历史性的几周内保持着良好的发展势头，而英特尔、博通、美光、Marvell 和安森美半导体则在 4 月份表现强劲。

items.title_en: What is Claude Mythos and what risks does it pose?
items.title_zh: 什么是克劳德神话？它会带来什么风险？
items.desc_en: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.
items.desc_zh: 该公司声称人工智能工具可以在某些黑客和网络安全任务上超越人类，这引发了金融界的担忧。

items.title_en: House Dem Sam Liccardo probes suspicious oil trades during Iran war
items.title_zh: 众议院民主党议员萨姆·利卡多调查伊朗战争期间可疑的石油交易
items.desc_en: A number of well-timed trades during the war have caught the attention of lawmakers and regulators.
items.desc_zh: 战争期间的一些适时交易引起了立法者和监管机构的注意。

items.title_en: Netflix was long 'a builder not a buyer.' Is that era over?
items.title_zh: Netflix 长期以来一直是“建设者而不是买家”。那个时代结束了吗？
items.desc_en: Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos said during an investor call the company built its 'M&A muscle' during its pursuit for WBD's assets.
items.desc_zh: Netflix 联合首席执行官特德·萨兰多斯 (Ted Sarandos) 在一次投资者电话会议上表示，该公司在收购 WBD 资产的过程中增强了“并购实力”。

items.title_en: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
items.title_zh: 穆加贝之子承认在南非持枪指控
items.desc_en: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.desc_zh: 贝拉明·穆加贝 (Bellarmine Mugabe) 于 2 月份在约翰内斯堡的家中枪击一名 23 岁男子后被捕。

items.title_en: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人移交 1982 年巴黎犹太餐厅袭击案嫌疑人
items.desc_en: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.
items.desc_zh: 希查姆·哈布 (Hicham Harb) 涉嫌指挥了玫瑰街的袭击，并且是向食客开枪的枪手之一。

items.title_en: Three charged with arson on Persian media offices in London
items.title_zh: 三人被控在伦敦波斯媒体办公室纵火
items.desc_en: Two teenagers and a 21-year-old man are due in court charged with arson with intent to endanger life.
items.desc_zh: 两名青少年和一名 21 岁男子将出庭受审，被指控犯有意图危害生命的纵火罪。

items.title_en: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
items.title_zh: 财政部长和顶级银行家对 Mythos AI 模型表示严重担忧
items.desc_en: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.
items.desc_zh: 专家表示，Mythos 可能具有前所未有的识别和利用网络安全弱点的能力。

items.title_en: Singer D4vd arrested in connection with death of missing teen girl
items.title_zh: 歌手 D4vd 因涉嫌失踪少女死亡而被捕
items.desc_en: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.
items.desc_zh: 去年，14 岁的塞莱斯特·里瓦斯·埃尔南德斯 (Celeste Rivas Hernandez) 的遗体在这位歌手的车里被发现。

items.title_en: South Korea's runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search
items.title_zh: 韩国逃跑的狼经过9天的搜寻终于被抓获
items.desc_en: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.
items.desc_zh: 这次搜寻过程一波三折，牵动着韩国的心，甚至还引发了一种迷因币的诞生。

items.title_en: Iranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe future
items.title_zh: 伊朗足球运动员表示澳大利亚给了他们安全未来的“希望”
items.desc_en: The duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.
items.desc_zh: 由于他们的足球队在比赛中没有唱国歌，两人寻求庇护。

items.title_en: Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
items.title_zh: 数字孪生能让你成为“超级工人”吗？
items.desc_en: Firms say digital twins make staff more productive, but are they a potential legal minefield?
items.desc_zh: 公司表示，数字孪生可以提高员工的工作效率，但它们是否是潜在的法律雷区？

items.title_en: Naples bank robbers hold 25 people hostage then vanish through tunnel
items.title_zh: 那不勒斯银行劫匪劫持25人作为人质，然后通过隧道消失
items.desc_en: The armed men reportedly evaded capture by escaping through the city's sewer system.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，这些武装人员通过城市的下水道系统逃脱了追捕。

items.title_en: Social media leaders called to Downing Street over children's safety
items.title_zh: 社交媒体领导人就儿童安全问题向唐宁街呼吁
items.desc_en: Top executives from firms such as Meta and YouTube will be asked what they are doing to protect children.
items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_zh: Geekflare Scraping API v2

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_en: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
items.title_zh: 量子计算：欧洲可以赢得科技竞赛吗？
items.desc_en: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?
items.desc_zh: 凭借该领域一些有前景的计算公司，欧洲能否成为量子技术的领导者？

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Great at gaming? US air traffic control wants you to apply
items.title_zh: 擅长游戏？美国空中交通管制中心希望您申请
items.desc_en: A new government ad campaign is trying to persuade gamers to apply for air safety roles.
items.desc_zh: 一项新的政府广告活动正试图说服游戏玩家申请航空安全职位。
